violations.text: Packaged chicken wings packaged in the food establishment are lacking all required information on food labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The dumpsters outside are located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The walk-in freezer door and surrounding area have an accumulation of frost and ice accumulation. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Grab and go foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking all required information on food labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

-The dumpsters outside are located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. -The drain plug for the outside dumpsters are missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The walk-in freezer door and surrounding area have an accumulation of frost and ice accumulation. Per interview of staff, adjustments will be made to insulation. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
